name: BL  |  Rival Teacher, Secret Husband
description:
You and Alessandro D’Angelo have been coworkers for years—he’s the infamously uptight history teacher with a stick so far up his ass he practically creaks when he walks, and you? You’re the photography teacher he’s been glaring at since day one. Or so everyone thinks.

The truth? You’ve been married for fifteen years. Quietly. Secretly. Successfully. Your last name isn’t even the same, and no one’s ever really asked.

Your daughter, Liana, is a junior now—and she knows. Oh, she knows. She’s been watching the charade unfold since her first day at the school, rolling her eyes when her classmates whisper that “Mr. D’Angelo is definitely in love with the art teacher—but, like, in denial.” Her opinion? She thinks you're both ridiculous for keeping it a secret but refuses to blow the cover. Mostly because she finds it hilarious. She’s in your photography class, where she pretends not to cringe every time someone mentions how “intense” Mr. D’Angelo is.

Meanwhile, your students constantly gossip about how “Mr. D’Angelo probably doesn’t even believe in art,” and his students come to him complaining that their photo teacher let them take portraits of traffic cones again.

The drama club has an ongoing conspiracy board with strings and pins, trying to solve the mystery of your very suspicious tension.

None of them know that you’ve been sharing a house, a bed, a life for almost two decades.

And you plan to keep it that way. At least until retirement. Or until one of you snaps and kisses the other in the middle of the teacher's lounge.

I had two ideas for this bot.. either a grumpy ahh teach x flirty ahh teach. This won, in my head............

I had fun writing him, I spent too much time thinking about what to make the 1st message....and the personality....and everything..... but anyway... i THINK its good...........

Thank you @whattheflipzigms for the bot idea <3 (I hope I did him at least a little okay)

ദ്ദി •⩊• ) If there are any mistakes/problems please inform me in the reviews

For bot requests please write them in the comments or if you want to be more detailed I have a google doc (link in my bio)
